message: Hey father, long time no see. Just got back from an overseas shoot and I watched a bit of the previous stream on my way home, and now this one... I have some advice if you're willing to listen to it.
Jay’s in my top bunk right now. I’m the plumber
I haven't watched you in the past 2 weeks so forgive me if you did some of it already, but what about those streams you promised before your daughter got sick like Pokemon, think you had a list...
stop over explaining like Phil daddy rich please
Listen, stop overthinking. Also, I got a two dollar raise on Monday

Unfortunately it seems, like you said, you overpromise and that get frustrating sometimes... Don't take it wrong, I like you and your content but maybe don't promise so much stuff? Also was I unmoded?
Intro Guy was the Garfunkel to your Simon
mod wrench back please Dad? was mod for 2 yrs
gunforhare has a channel it youalwayswins
The Xbox One X was a fantastic upgrade
Nintendo ever gonna move on from Switch? Only a matter of time before 3rd party give up on it. No way it's can hold a candle to the other current gen games.
The original PSP wasn't that popular outside Japan
what is that castlevania music called on ur sounds

My friend started a go fund me for my cancer screenings, we’re 3/4ths of the way there in a weeks time. Really appreciate everyone’s support here, been nice to laugh at farts, Phil loads, birds, and Rich’s dj skills.
8K was on the box of the PS5 never forget :grinning_squinting_face: Also give me a random DSP compilation the worse the better
PS5 currently is barely doing 1080p 60FPS on most of its games
Rich shove a ukulele in Jay's ass
Rich, you were working on a project tonight. You were working on cooking up those 200 quesdillas for ol El Queso Grande.
Looks like Colleen, the camera was purposely on.
You know, a certain someone could use 200 handies.......if you catch my drift :^)
Their microwave seems to have beeped two hundred times. What do you think they're cooking in there? Cheese?
just succesfully upgraded my deck to 2 tb's
There's actually a good way to get a girl to give you 200 nuts. Unfortunately, you have to give them large quantities of cheese
You gotta start doing something else for work? My local cheese factory has about two hundred openings. Could probably apply.
just give me my $200! daddy needs that cheddar
WHOS BORN 98? COLLEEN? I THOUGHT SHE WAS 36?
I WAS 12 IN 1998 SELLING USED NES AT DKOLDIES
I was only 6 in 1998, im 31 now

random question but is it bad I don't drive at 22? last time I had a driving lesson I had a panic attack so I safely pulled over and the driving instructor kicked off, been too scared to learn again ever since, anxiety yay
Thank you Rich for helping me get away from my dad who was diagnosed withe bone cancer. I come here after taking care of him all day to laugh
Super Sticker
Super Sticker
Rich if you sent me a thong wonder what you doing wearing thong.
I thnk she got away with it because she never wore them, seemed light hearted and no sexual intent seemed implied. But I hear u Rich
Did they get to the part about Trisha paytas?
Don't ban him, you're just proving him right.
What was the guy saying? I don’t pay attention to chat.
Welcome to Membirds!
took half a gummy of delta8 what will I expect
Just saw Paramore live. Holy foook! Excellent band
